hero.welcome: Welcome to Saraya Web Design & SEO
hero.heading: Professional Website Creation Services for Your Business.
hero.subtext: Your website is the face of your business in the digital world. Let's build the best image for your business together with Saraya.

pricing.label: Website Packages
pricing.heading: Choose the Package That Fits Your Needs
pricing.subtext: We provide various website creation price packages to meet all your needs. All packages already include domain, hosting, and custom design.

portfolio.label: Portfolio
portfolio.heading: Our Work
portfolio.subtext: Experience delivering hundreds of website projects with the best quality for every client.

cta_banner.label: Build Your Digital Business With Saraya
cta_banner.heading: Strategic Steps Toward Your Business Growth
cta_banner.subtext: We provide digital solutions and services designed to optimize operations, increase productivity, and help your business grow faster and stronger.

why_us.label: Why Saraya Website?
why_us.heading: Why Should You Choose Saraya Website?
why_us.subtext: Saraya Website has been trusted as a reliable business partner for entrepreneurs. We will build a modern website so your business is easier to reach.

testimonial.label: Testimonial
testimonial.heading: What Do They Say?
testimonial.subtext: Here are testimonials from Saraya's customers.

items.name: Ozzie Lenka
items.text: Recommended for those who are just starting a business and want to have a website, the price can be adjusted to your needs and you are guided to manage the website until you can do it yourself.

items.name: Syahrul Gunawan
items.role: IT Staff, Dinas Arpusda Provinsi Jawa Tengah
items.text: Thank you to the Saraya team who completed the arpusda.jatengprov.go.id website very well. The design is modern, features are complete, and easy to access. Communication is fast and the results met our expectations. We are satisfied and recommend Saraya as a trusted website creation partner.

items.name: Saraya Customer
items.text: Saraya Website's service is very satisfying. A professional, responsive team, always ready to help. The website created looks professional and suits my business needs. Highly recommended!

faq.heading: Still Have Questions?
faq.subtext: If you still have other questions, don't hesitate to contact us.

items.q: Why do I need a website for my business?
items.a: A website allows you to convey information about your products, services and increase the visibility of your business globally, active 24 hours a day.

items.q: How much does it cost to create a website?
items.a: Website prices start from 1.1 million rupiah depending on your website needs.

items.q: How long does it take to build the website?
items.a: Website creation takes 3-5 working days, the work is adjusted to the complexity of the website you order.

items.q: Is there a warranty after the website is done?
items.a: Yes, we provide a lifetime warranty for every website we create. We also provide periodic maintenance and support services to ensure your website always runs well.

cta_bottom.label: Trust Saraya Website
cta_bottom.heading: Contact Us Right Now
cta_bottom.subtext: Create your dream website with us and experience the quality difference we provide.

footer.desc: Professional, Trusted, and Experienced Website Creation Services in Indonesia.
